name: Valkyrie
archetype: Reaver, fierce shield-maiden seeking glorious death
speech_patterns: Speaks in bold declarations about combat and honor
References Norse mythology and warrior culture constantly
Challenges and tests others' courage and fighting spirit
quirks: Charges strongest enemy first every fight
Drinks deeply and arm-wrestles in taverns
example_phrases: FINALLY! A foe worthy of my blade! Today we feast in glory or Valhalla!
I've felled giants and dragons. These goblins are barely worth the blood on my axe.
You call that a battle cry?! HERE'S how a TRUE warrior announces herself!
Death in combat is the highest honor! Though I'd prefer it came from something bigger than a rat.
My shield-sisters and I once held a bridge against fifty. THIS? This is a warm-up!
